name: 6pc Measuring Cup Set Blue - Room Essentials™
description:
Precisely measure out a variety of ingredients while cooking or baking with this 6-Piece Measuring Cup Set from Room Essentials™. Made from plastic, these measuring cups are designed in an attractive blue shade. Featuring graduating sizes ranging from 1/4 cup to a full one cup, all the pieces in the set are dishwasher safe for easy cleaning.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
